mapper.select: SELECT vrfcn_inst_id, ognz_id, vrfcn_inst_nm, vrfcn_inst_nm_en, addr, icao_ccr_accrd_yn, icao_ccr_accrd_no, icao_ccr_accrd_xpr_dt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_vrfcn_inst WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY vrfcn_inst_nm

SELECT vrfcn_inst_id, ognz_id, vrfcn_inst_nm, vrfcn_inst_nm_en, addr, icao_ccr_accrd_yn, icao_ccr_accrd_no, icao_ccr_accrd_xpr_dt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_vrfcn_inst WHERE vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_vrfcn_inst (vrfcn_inst_id, ognz_id, vrfcn_inst_nm, vrfcn_inst_nm_en, addr, icao_ccr_accrd_yn, icao_ccr_accrd_no, icao_ccr_accrd_xpr_dt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{vrfcnInstId}, #{ognzId}, #{vrfcnInstNm}, #{vrfcnInstNmEn}, #{addr}, #{icaoCcrAccrdYn}, #{icaoCcrAccrdNo}, #{icaoCcrAccrdXprDt}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_vrfcn_inst SET ognz_id = #{ognzId}, vrfcn_inst_nm = #{vrfcnInstNm}, vrfcn_inst_nm_en = #{vrfcnInstNmEn}, addr = #{addr}, icao_ccr_accrd_yn = #{icaoCcrAccrdYn}, icao_ccr_accrd_no = #{icaoCcrAccrdNo}, icao_ccr_accrd_xpr_dt = #{icaoCcrAccrdXprDt}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(vrfcn_inst_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM com.tn_vrfcn_inst WHERE vrfcn_inst_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(vrfcn_inst_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
